name: Seattle
intro: Ignite Productions deploys trained, energetic brand ambassadors across Seattle, the Eastside, and the entire Pacific Northwest. From Pike Place pop-ups to tech campus activations, we bring your brand to life in one of America's most innovative markets.
faq1:
How quickly can you staff an event in Seattle?

Rain or shine, we staff fast. Most Seattle activations can be deployed within 48-72 hours, from Pike Place Market pop-ups to Convention Center trade shows to tech campus events across the Eastside. For multi-city PNW tours or festival season programs, we recommend 1-2 weeks lead time.
faq2:
What types of events do you staff in Seattle?

Everything from product sampling at grocery and retail locations to experiential activations at festivals, trade shows at the Convention Center, tech campus events, street teams across Capitol Hill and Fremont, and mobile tours through the PNW.
faq3:
Can you cover Portland and the rest of the PNW?

Absolutely. Seattle is our PNW hub. We regularly activate across Washington, Oregon, and Idaho, including Portland, Tacoma, Olympia, and Bend from our Seattle talent base.
faq4:
How do you ensure quality and accountability?

Every Seattle activation is tracked through Spark, our proprietary platform. GPS-verified check-ins confirm your team is on-site across the metro and Eastside, timestamped photos capture consumer engagement rain or shine, and live dashboards give you full visibility. Our veteran-led PNW operations team ensures every program runs with the accountability and attention to detail that defines Ignite.

name: Houston
intro: Ignite Productions deploys trained, energetic brand ambassadors across Houston, the suburbs, and the Gulf Coast. From the Galleria to NRG Stadium, we bring your brand to life in America's fourth-largest city.
faq1:
How quickly can you staff an event in Houston?

Houston's massive footprint is no problem. We can staff most activations within 48-72 hours across the Greater Houston metro, from the Galleria to NRG Center to The Heights. For Houston Rodeo season or multi-week Gulf Coast campaigns, we recommend 2-3 weeks advance notice for the best talent selection.
faq2:
What types of events do you staff in Houston?

Everything from product sampling at grocery and retail locations to experiential activations at the Houston Rodeo, trade shows at NRG Center and George R. Brown, street teams across Midtown and The Heights, and mobile tours across the Gulf Coast.
faq3:
Do you have bilingual staff in Houston?

Yes. Houston is one of the most diverse cities in America. Our talent pool includes bilingual and multilingual ambassadors fluent in Spanish, Vietnamese, Mandarin, and more to connect with Houston's diverse communities.
faq4:
How do you ensure quality and accountability?

Every Houston activation is tracked through Spark, our proprietary platform. GPS-verified check-ins confirm your team is on-site across the metro's sprawling geography, timestamped photos capture every interaction, and live dashboards let you monitor results from anywhere. Our veteran-led field managers coordinate Houston operations with the precision and accountability that sets Ignite apart.

name: Dallas
intro: Ignite Productions deploys trained, energetic brand ambassadors across Dallas, Fort Worth, and the entire DFW metroplex. From Deep Ellum pop-ups to AT&T Stadium events, we bring your brand to life in the heart of Texas.
faq1:
How quickly can you staff an event in Dallas?

The DFW market moves big, and we keep pace. Most Dallas activations can be staffed within 48-72 hours with our deep Texas talent roster. Whether it's a Convention Center trade show, a Design District launch, or a State Fair activation, we have experienced ambassadors ready. For statewide Texas campaigns, 1-2 weeks lead time is ideal.
faq2:
What types of events do you staff in DFW?
